briefdescription.para: Registration of shell command 'd' for dumping floating point accelerometer raw data.
Registration of shell command 'db' for dumping accelerometer raw data bytes.
Registration of shell command 'dd' for dumping displacement data.

simplesect.title: Detailed Description
simplesect.para: See description in adxl_store header file
